concepts.rationale: Rescue lowest P+D game autoplay-chicken (P=42, D=0) by swapping loop and adding sound.
concepts.prompt_seed: Rescue the game "Autoplay Chicken". Keep core mechanic, replace weakest loop with near_miss_reward, add audio feedback, tighten first-tap payoff, cap session to 60s.
